profiles.name: Sean "Diddy" Combs
profiles.bio: Music mogul, entrepreneur, and cultural icon. Known for his influence in hip-hop, fashion, and business ventures. Father of seven children.
profiles.location: Los Angeles, CA / New York, NY

profiles.name: Kim Porter
profiles.bio: Model, actress, and mother. Long-term partner of Sean Combs and mother to three of his children.

profiles.name: Cassie Ventura
profiles.bio: Singer, model, and actress. Known for hit single "Me & U" and long-term relationship with Sean Combs.

profiles.name: Jennifer Lopez
profiles.bio: Multi-talented entertainer, actress, singer, and businesswoman. Global superstar with numerous hit songs and movies.
profiles.location: Los Angeles, CA / New York, NY

profiles.name: Yung Miami
profiles.bio: Rapper and member of City Girls. Known for her bold personality and music career.

profiles.name: Sarah Chapman
profiles.bio: Entrepreneur and mother. Known for her relationship with Sean Combs and mother to his daughter Chance.

profiles.name: Aubrey O'Day
profiles.bio: Singer, songwriter, and reality TV personality. Former member of Danity Kane and solo artist.

profiles.bio: Fashion stylist and designer. Pioneer in hip-hop fashion and mother to Sean Combs' son Justin.

profiles.name: Elon Musk
profiles.bio: Entrepreneur, business magnate, and investor. CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, owner of X (formerly Twitter). Known for revolutionary work in electric vehicles, space exploration, and social media.

profiles.name: Justine Wilson
profiles.bio: Canadian author and ex-wife of Elon Musk. Known for her novels and writing about their relationship. Mother of five sons.

profiles.name: Talulah Riley
profiles.bio: British actress known for "Pride and Prejudice," "Westworld," and "Inception." Ex-wife of Elon Musk (married twice).

profiles.name: Grimes (Claire Boucher)
profiles.bio: Canadian musician, singer, and producer. Known for experimental pop music and relationship with Elon Musk. Mother of two children.

profiles.bio: Conservative commentator, social media personality, and political activist. Known for her commentary on current events.

profiles.name: Jennifer Gwynne
profiles.bio: Former University of Pennsylvania student and Elon Musk's college girlfriend. Later became known for auctioning memorabilia from their relationship.

profiles.bio: American actress known for "Aquaman," "The Rum Diary," and high-profile legal battles. Former wife of Johnny Depp.

ratings.notes: First marriage, music producer. Divorced due to alleged abuse and control issues.
High-profile relationship that included infamous tape. On-and-off relationship.
Short-lived relationship before his marriage to Mariah Carey.
Serious relationship with NFL player. Ended due to career pressures and distance.
Brief relationship with Dallas Cowboys player.
Highly publicized 72-day marriage. Divorced citing irreconcilable differences.
Longest relationship, married with four children (North, Saint, Chicago, Psalm). Divorced due to his mental health issues and erratic behavior.
High-profile relationship after Kanye divorce. Ended due to long distance and busy schedules.
Brief rumored connection after Pete Davidson breakup.
